Our story

Where tradition meets community

Located at 7 Victoria Street in the heart of Hamilton, the Yoga Centre Bermuda has quietly grown into the island's most trusted institution for traditional yoga practice. Founded in 1994 by Joanne Wohlmuth and Frances Marshall (co-founders) — it is the first yoga centre in Bermuda.

Our lineage honours practices that have guided seekers for thousands of years: asana, pranayama, meditation, and the exploration of yoga as a spiritual discipline. Our mission is to share the full spectrum of the benefits of yoga, beyond merely the physical, with every individual.

We continue to evolve and have survived decades of radical changes: in the world, on the island, and within these walls. Still we remain firmly rooted, offering the same reliable teachings year-after-year – because the Yoga Centre is a community, not just a studio.

42Years of practice
1stYoga centre in Bermuda
RYTYoga Alliance accredited training

Our evolution

Rooted and still growing

The founders

A Shared Vision

United by devotion to yoga, Joanne and Frances shared a vision: to create a dedicated space where yoga could be accessible to all.

→

1994

The Yoga Centre Opens Its Doors

A sanctuary for practice, learning, and personal transformation is established in the heart of Hamilton — something Bermuda had never seen before.

→

Today

A Living Community

A thriving collective of teachers and students, grounded in its original spirit: a welcoming community united by the transformative power of yoga.

Registered School

Continuing Education

"Yoga is not just physical exercise. It is a way of life — a means of finding your true Self and expressing that truth in every moment."

— Sri Swami Satchidananda

Express interest

Starting July 15, 2026

Yoga Teacher Training

Summer/Fall Training & Info Session · Yoga on the Rock School of Yoga

A new Yoga Alliance certified 200hr Teacher Training commences July 15th, running until November 15th, 2026. This 4-month accelerated programme is primarily held at The Yoga Centre with some online sessions. Join us for an Info Session on Thursday, June 25th at 6:00pm to learn more. A 6-month January–June training is also planned for 2027.

Express interest

A unique offering

Private & Group
Yoga Therapy Sessions

Work one-on-one or in small groups with our C-IAYT Certified Yoga Therapists — trained to use yoga tools as therapy to support your individual health, recovery, and wellbeing goals.

Contact Joanne or Frances to enquire about Yoga Therapy.

The community

Our teachers

Core faculty

Joanne Wohlmuth

Co-Founder

Co-founder of The Yoga Centre Bermuda, Joanne has been practising and teaching yoga for over 45 years. An E-RYT 500, C-IAYT certified Yoga Therapist, and founder of Yoga on the Rock, she brings a deeply holistic and individual approach to every class.

Full profile

Frances Marshall

Co-Founder

Co-founder of The Yoga Centre Bermuda and founder of LivingYoga Bermuda, Frances is an IAYT Certified Yoga Therapist and RYT 500+. She specialises in multi-level Hatha, Yin, Restorative, and individual Yoga Therapy — with a holistic approach that draws on breathwork, meditation, Ayurveda, and sound healing to support each student's unique journey.

Full profile

Teacher Training

Interested in becoming a teacher?

Earn RYT credits and become a certified yoga teacher with us. The Yoga Centre offers accredited training rooted in decades of authentic practice and lineage.
